task_objective: Press-on Nail Shape Transformation - Only change press-on nail shape silhouette, preserve pattern design

structural_reference.focus: Target press-on nail shape silhouette, quantity, position, characters
structural_reference.role: Provide geometric shape and structural reference for target press-on nail shape

aesthetic_reference.focus: Complete pattern design, color scheme, texture, shine effects
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide pattern design and visual elements to be preserved

target_shape.description: [Fill in press-on nail shape: Long Trapezoid/Square/Oval/Stiletto/etc]

workflow.role: Professional Press-on Nail Artist & Technical ControlNet Expert

steps.step_1_structure_locking: Strictly follow Image 1 line art, ensure complete matching of quantity, position, characters, and press-on nail shape geometric silhouette.
steps.step_2_pattern_preservation: Completely extract pattern design, color distribution, texture, and shine highlights from Image 2 press-on nail design
steps.step_3_shape_mapping: Precisely map Image 2's pattern design onto Image 1's target press-on nail shape silhouette, maintaining pattern proportion and layout

final_execution:
Generate a four-panel grid layout displaying:
1. The precise result: High-fidelity press-on nail design, strictly adopt Image 1 press-on nail shape silhouette, completely preserve Image 2 pattern design, [Insert target press-on nail shape], clean light gray background, no text, no fingers, no human elements, no layout shift, no perspective distortion.
2. Vertical mirror reflection: Upside-down flip of View 1.
3. On-hand wearing view: Clenched fist angle (showing palm/fingers).
4. On-hand wearing view: Back of hand angle (dorsal view).
